problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: Combining Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
